evals.prompt: Design an analytics feature collecting user events, device data, IP addresses, and free-text search terms through a third-party SDK.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Requires approved purpose/legal basis rather than inventing consent
Maps SDK recipients, regions, logs, and derived data
Defines retention, rights, and DPIA gates
Avoids universal identifiers or cryptographic defaults

evals.prompt: Review a proposed erasure flow that sets `deleted_at` but retains profiles in search, logs, analytics, and backups indefinitely.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: States soft deletion is not erasure
Handles backup expiry and restore-time replay
Does not promise deletion where law requires retention

evals.prompt: Assess whether hashed email addresses are anonymous and outside GDPR.
evals.expected_output: An evidence-backed, scoped response following the skill workflow.
assertions: Treats deterministic/linkable hashes as likely pseudonymous
Assesses reasonably likely re-identification and auxiliary data
